exploration_notes: Found all client-side retry and timeout policy files in etcd-io/etcd's client/v3 package. The key files are: (1) **retry_interceptor.go** - the gRPC unary and stream retry interceptors with backoff logic, based on grpc-ecosystem/go-grpc-middleware/retry; (2) **retry.go** - per-service retry client wrappers (retryKVClient, retryLeaseClient) that annotate RPCs with repeatable/nonRepeatable policy and implement isSafeRetryImmutableRPC/isSafeRetryMutableRPC; (3) **client.go** - client construction w
